screens.title: Launch Campaign Home
screens.description: A cinematic storefront introduces the spring performance drop with editorial product imagery and clear shopping paths.

screens.title: Performance Essentials Collection
screens.description: The catalog view combines campaign storytelling, filters, sorting controls, and a focused product grid.

screens.title: Product Detail Conversion Flow
screens.description: The product page pairs large technical imagery with size selection, store reservation, and add-to-bag actions.

screens.title: Secure Checkout Bag
screens.description: The bag screen summarizes selected products, shipping benefits, and a high-contrast checkout call to action.
